description: B4c's tests/cli.rs landed at 301 lines because the pre-commit hook's failure was masked by 'git commit ... | tail -N && bl review' — tail's success exit overwrote git commit's failure exit, so the abort never propagated. Split the integration test file into focused submodules per the file-decomposition convention.
title: Split issues plugin tests/cli.rs to fit 300-line cap
